memoryArtifacts.headline: Familie
memoryArtifacts.description: De eerste eigenaar van de polder Albrandswaard was, afgezien van de stichter, ene onbekende Albrand, vermoedelijk heer Hugo van IJsselmonde, een ridder die dit deel van zijn bezit als huwelijksgift me …

zh.IJsselstein, Utrecht, Nederland: 荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre是Van IJsselmonde的兒子，於1120年出生在荷蘭霍蘭艾姆-賓。他和Stephania至少有1個女兒。他去世於1190年在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦享年70歲。

zh-hans.IJsselstein, Utrecht, Nederland: 荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre是Van IJsselmonde的儿子，于1120年出生在荷兰霍蘭艾姆-賓。他和Stephania至少有1个女儿。他去世于1190年在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gelre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Gelles  . This surname is rare in Germany.
Hungarian: from a pet form of the personal name Gellért (see Gellert ).
French (Gellé): variant of Gelé, a nickname from gelé ‘frozen’.

variants.name: Gelles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Erna, Kurt.
German: metronymic from the German female personal name Gele, a short form of either Angela or Gertrude (see Trude ). This surname is very rare in Germany.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Gele, borrowed from German Christians (see 1 above), + Yiddish possessive -s.

nameMeanings.name: Hugo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of   Hugh  , used throughout the Middle Ages in official documents, and now enjoying a revival as a given name.

en.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre was born in 1120, in Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Netherlands as the son of Van IJsselmonde. He had at least 1 daughter with Stephania. He died in 1190, in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre est né en 1120, à Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Pays-Bas, fils de Van IJsselmonde. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Stephania. Il est décédé en 1190, à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre wurde 1120 in Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Niederlande, als Sohn von Van IJsselmonde geboren. Er hatte mit Stephania mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 70 Jahren in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre è nato il nel 1120 nel Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Paesi Bassi come figlio di Van IJsselmonde. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Stephania. Morì nel 1190, nel IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Nederland: オランダホーランドエグモンド-ビン
ja.North Holland, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-hオランド
ja.IJsselstein, Utrecht, Nederland: オランダウトレチトイジセルステイン
ja.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelreは1120年にオランダホーランドエグモンド-ビンでVan IJsselmondeの息子として生まれた。彼はStephaniaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1190年にオランダウトレチトイジセルステインで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre(은)는 1120년 네덜란드 홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 Van IJsselmonde의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Stephania(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre nasceu em 1120, em Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Países Baixos filho de Van IJsselmonde. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Stephania. Ele faleceu em 1190, em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre родился в 1120 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, холланд, Нидерланды. Его отца звали Van IJsselmonde. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Stephania. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hugo van IJsselmonde van Gelre nació en 1120, en Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Países Bajos como hijo de Van IJsselmonde. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Stephania. Murió en 1190, en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos, a la edad de 70 años.
